zh.lifeSummary: Mrs. Humphreys Conyers於1251年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾。她和Sir Humfreys Conyers至少有1個兒子。她去世在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs. Humphreys Conyers于1251年出生在英国英格兰越可爾。她和Sir Humfreys Conyers至少有1个儿子。她去世在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Conyers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire, of Norman origin): habitational name from either of two places in northern France, Coignières in Seine-et-Oise or Cogners in Sarthe. Alternatively, a variant of Conyer , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Conyer
meanings: English: occupational name for a minter, a coiner of money, from an agent derivative of Old French coignier ‘to stamp money, to mint’.

nameMeanings.name: Humphreys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. Humphreys Conyers was born in 1251, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. She had at least 1 son with Sir Humfreys Conyers. She died in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs. Humphreys Conyers est née en 1251, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Sir Humfreys Conyers. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs. Humphreys Conyers wurde 1251 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hatte mit Sir Humfreys Conyers mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs. Humphreys Conyers è nata il nel 1251 nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Sir Humfreys Conyers. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.Galfred, Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Mrs. Humphreys Conyersは1251年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた。彼女はSir Humfreys Conyersとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. Humphreys Conyers(은)는 1251년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Sir Humfreys Conyers(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs. Humphreys Conyers nasceu em 1251, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Sir Humfreys Conyers. Ela faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs. Humphreys Conyers родилась в 1251 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Sir Humfreys Conyers. Она умерла в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs. Humphreys Conyers nació en 1251, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Sir Humfreys Conyers. Murió en su pueblo.
